assertions.title: Tapping a search result navigates to correct detail page

steps.observed: Homepage loaded with banner, search bar, and product grid

steps.action: Tap 'Find products' search bar to open overlay
steps.expected: Search overlay opens with trending items
steps.observed: Search overlay opened showing trending products and events
Results showed Belgium Home Jersey 2026, Croatia Home Jersey 2026, Mexico Home Jersey 2026, and more product results

steps.action: Tap 'View Belgium Home Jersey 2026' product result
steps.expected: Navigate to /products/[id] with correct product data
steps.observed: Navigated to /products/cmn8cc0ws0006l09owz18n84r showing Belgium Home Jersey 2026, $28.99, with Belgium flag image. Overlay closed.

steps.action: Go back and open search overlay again
steps.expected: Homepage restored, overlay opens with trending items
steps.observed: Homepage restored, overlay opened with trending items including events

steps.action: Tap 'View USA VS Mexico' event result from trending
steps.expected: Navigate to /events/[id] with correct event data
steps.observed: Navigated to /events/cmn8cc0x1000tl09oj80u3rno showing USA VS Mexico event at MetLife Stadium, $98.00. Overlay closed.

assertions.title: No results state shown for unmatched queries

steps.action: Navigate to homepage and open search overlay
steps.observed: Search overlay opened with trending items
Displayed 'No results found' heading with 'Try a different search term' helper text and search icon illustration

steps.action: Verify no blank screen or errors
steps.expected: User-friendly empty state with no errors
steps.observed: Clean empty state with icon, heading, and helper text. No blank screen, no errors.

steps.action: Open search overlay via 'Find products' button
steps.observed: Overlay opened with trending items and close button visible
Overlay dismissed, homepage fully restored with banner, search bar, and product grid visible
Overlay opened
Overlay dismissed, homepage restored. Snapshot confirmed no overlay elements (no 'Close search' button, no textbox) present.

assertions.title: No console errors during complete search flow

steps.action: Clear all console errors and logs
steps.observed: Errors and console cleared
Homepage loaded
Overlay opened showing trending products and events
Results showed Switzerland Team Cap, Norway Team Cap, Australia Team Cap, Denmark Team Cap
Navigated to /products/cmn8cc0wv000hl09otnwjb9p8 (product detail page)
Homepage restored at http://localhost:3000/
errors command returned empty output (no errors)
Only info and warning messages (React DevTools notice, Next.js Image optimization warnings, scroll-behavior warning). Zero error-level entries.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-SEARCH-007: Product and event search results correctly navigate to /products/[id] and /events/[id] respectively with matching data, overlay closes on navigation. VAL-SEARCH-008: No-results state shows user-friendly 'No results found' message with helper text. VAL-SEARCH-009: Overlay dismisses via close button (X) and Escape key, homepage restores correctly. VAL-SEARCH-011: Complete search flow (open overlay -> trending -> type query -> results -> tap result -> detail page -> back) produces zero console.error entries.
